    HashMapPersistentDataType - Class in xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util
    A stateless PersistentDataType for storing and retrieving HashMap<String, Object>.
    HashMapPersistentDataType.LoadResult - Record Class in xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util
    The deserialized map together with any metadata embedded at save time.
    HashMapPersistentDataType.SaveContext - Record Class in xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util
    Optional metadata embedded alongside the map when saving.
